_meta.title: SwingEdge Pro — FINAL COMPLETE Application Schema
_meta.description: 100% complete JSON schema for standalone laptop swing trading app covering Indian + US equities with all features, stock-specific entry/exit rules, all indicators with entry/exit rules, all missing functionalities, notification system, AI prediction, local storage, login protection, and modern dark UI.
_meta.author: SwingEdge AI
_meta.build_order: A(Auth+DB) → B(Data+Indicators) → C(Scoring+Prediction) → D(UI Screens) → E(Alerts+Notifications) → F(Analytics+Polish) → G(Packaging)
fixes_applied: Added 'name' field to all technical_indicators entries

application.name: SwingEdge Pro
application.tagline: Elite Indian & US Equity Swing Trading Intelligence

authentication.description: Single-user local login — no cloud auth. Password stored as SHA-256 hash in local SQLite.

pin.description: Quick PIN for fast login after initial session

biometric.note: Optional — Windows Hello / macOS Touch ID via platform API

login_screen.logo: SwingEdge Pro logo + animated candlestick background
login_screen.forgot_password: Reset via secret answer stored locally

ohlcv_cache.description: Local OHLCV cache to reduce API calls

indicator_cache.description: Pre-computed indicators stored locally for speed

settings.description: All app settings stored as key-value pairs

scan_results.description: Daily scan output stored for history

1_login.name: Login Screen
1_login.transitions: Fade in on load; slide up on success

market_pulse_bar.style: scrolling ticker tape + color coded green/red

market_mood_meter.range: Extreme Fear → Fear → Neutral → Greed → Extreme Greed

top_opportunities.shows: Top 6 swing trade setups from latest scan

recent_alerts.shows: Last 10 alerts fired with timestamp and stock name

fii_dii_bar.data: Last 10 days FII + DII net flow

3_live_scanner.name: Live Market Scanner
3_live_scanner.description: Real-time scanning of Nifty 100 + Nifty 200 + US stocks during market hours

auto_pattern_overlay.draws: Automatically marks detected patterns on chart with colored regions

components: Price prediction direction badge (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL) with confidence %
Position size calculator (input capital → output shares + amount)
Export trade card as PDF button

news_tab.shows: Latest 20 news items for this ticker with sentiment badge and source link

6_portfolio.name: Portfolio Tracker
features: Add holdings (ticker, quantity, buy price, date)
Phase tracking (which phase each holding is in)

7_alerts_manager.name: Alerts Manager
features: Alert templates (one-click create for T1/T2/SL alerts)

dark_pro.animations: 200ms fade transitions; card hover scale 1.02; number ticker on price update; slide-in alert popup
dark_pro.components: Cards with 12px border-radius; gradient borders on hover; sticky table headers; dark chart backgrounds

EMA.formula: EMA(t) = Close(t) * k + EMA(t-1) * (1-k) where k = 2/(period+1)

RULE_EMA_E1.name: Golden Cross Entry
RULE_EMA_E1.condition: EMA50 crosses ABOVE EMA200 (fresh within last 5 days)
RULE_EMA_E1.action: BUY at market open or at EMA20 on pullback

RULE_EMA_E2.name: EMA20 Bounce Entry (Pullback Buy)
RULE_EMA_E2.condition: Price pulls back to EMA20 in an uptrend (all EMAs aligned bullish)
RULE_EMA_E2.action: BUY when daily candle closes above EMA20 after touching it

RULE_EMA_E3.name: EMA50 Support Entry
RULE_EMA_E3.condition: Price bounces from EMA50 with a bullish candle
RULE_EMA_E3.action: BUY on close above EMA50 bounce candle high

RULE_EMA_E4.name: Perfect Alignment Entry
RULE_EMA_E4.condition: Price > EMA9 > EMA20 > EMA50 > EMA200 (all 5 stacked bullish)

RULE_EMA_X4.name: EMA200 Breakdown Exit
RULE_EMA_X4.action: EXIT ALL immediately — long-term downtrend confirmed

EMA.name: Exponential Moving Average

RSI.formula: RSI = 100 - (100 / (1 + RS)); RS = AvgGain / AvgLoss over N periods

RULE_RSI_E1.name: RSI Sweet Spot Entry
RULE_RSI_E1.action: BUY — ideal entry zone with maximum upside before overbought

RULE_RSI_E2.name: RSI Oversold Reversal Entry
RULE_RSI_E2.condition: RSI drops below 30 then turns back UP above 30
RULE_RSI_E2.action: BUY on RSI cross above 30 with confirming bullish candle
RULE_RSI_E2.confirmation_needed: Bullish engulfing or hammer candle + volume spike

RULE_RSI_E3.name: RSI Bullish Divergence Entry
RULE_RSI_E3.condition: Price makes LOWER LOW but RSI makes HIGHER LOW
RULE_RSI_E3.action: BUY — strong reversal signal; price decline is weakening
RULE_RSI_E3.confirmation_needed: Confirmed by MACD or EMA signal

RULE_RSI_E4.name: RSI Midline (50) Bounce Entry
RULE_RSI_E4.condition: RSI bounces from 50 level in an uptrend (RSI touched 45-50 then reversed up)
RULE_RSI_E4.action: BUY — pullback in uptrend ended; momentum resuming

RULE_RSI_X1.name: RSI Overbought Exit
RULE_RSI_X1.action: EXIT 50% of position; raise trailing stop on remainder

RULE_RSI_X3.name: RSI Bearish Divergence Exit
RULE_RSI_X3.condition: Price makes HIGHER HIGH but RSI makes LOWER HIGH

RULE_RSI_X4.name: RSI Support Break Exit
RULE_RSI_X4.condition: RSI drops below 40 after being above 50 (trend weakening)

RSI.name: Relative Strength Index

RULE_MACD_E1.name: MACD Bullish Crossover Entry
RULE_MACD_E1.condition: MACD line crosses ABOVE Signal line (fresh — within last 2 days)

RULE_MACD_E2.name: MACD Zero Line Crossover Entry
RULE_MACD_E2.condition: MACD line crosses ABOVE 0 (both MACD and Signal become positive)
RULE_MACD_E2.action: BUY — confirms trend turning positive after downtrend

RULE_MACD_E3.name: MACD Histogram Momentum Entry
RULE_MACD_E3.condition: Histogram is positive AND increasing for 3+ consecutive days

RULE_MACD_E4.name: MACD Bullish Divergence Entry
RULE_MACD_E4.condition: Price makes LOWER LOW but MACD histogram makes HIGHER LOW
RULE_MACD_E4.action: BUY — selling pressure weakening; reversal building

RULE_MACD_X1.name: MACD Bearish Crossover Exit
RULE_MACD_X1.condition: MACD line crosses BELOW Signal line
RULE_MACD_X1.action: EXIT 50% if profitable; EXIT 100% if at stop loss

RULE_MACD_X2.name: MACD Zero Line Breakdown Exit
RULE_MACD_X2.action: EXIT 100% — momentum fully reversed to bearish

RULE_MACD_X3.name: MACD Histogram Deceleration Exit
RULE_MACD_X3.condition: Histogram is positive but DECLINING for 3+ consecutive days (peak formed)
RULE_MACD_X3.action: EXIT 25-50%; raise trailing stop — momentum fading

RULE_MACD_X4.name: MACD Bearish Divergence Exit
RULE_MACD_X4.condition: Price makes HIGHER HIGH but MACD makes LOWER HIGH
RULE_MACD_X4.action: EXIT 100% — uptrend losing steam; reversal signal

ATR.description: Average True Range — used for position sizing, entry zones, and stop loss

RULE_ATR_E1.name: ATR Contraction Entry
RULE_ATR_E1.condition: ATR(14) is at its lowest level in 20 days (volatility compression)
RULE_ATR_E1.action: BUY on breakout above recent high — low ATR precedes explosive moves

RULE_ATR_E2.name: ATR Entry Zone
RULE_ATR_E2.action: BUY if price enters the entry zone — avoid buying outside this band

RULE_ATR_X1.name: ATR Trailing Stop
RULE_ATR_X1.condition: After entry: Trailing SL = Highest Close since entry - 2.0 * ATR
RULE_ATR_X1.action: EXIT when price closes below trailing stop level

RULE_ATR_X2.name: ATR Expansion Exit
RULE_ATR_X2.condition: ATR doubles from entry ATR value (extreme volatility event)
RULE_ATR_X2.action: EXIT 50% — abnormal volatility = risk event; protect capital

ATR.name: Average True Range

RULE_BB_E1.name: Bollinger Squeeze Breakout Entry
RULE_BB_E1.condition: BandWidth < 10% (squeeze) AND price breaks above Upper Band with volume > 1.5x
RULE_BB_E1.action: BUY on the breakout candle close — explosive move imminent

RULE_BB_E2.name: Lower Band Bounce Entry
RULE_BB_E2.condition: Price touches Lower Band AND RSI < 40 AND bullish reversal candle forms
RULE_BB_E2.action: BUY — mean reversion trade; target Middle Band (minimum)

RULE_BB_E3.name: Middle Band Reclaim Entry
RULE_BB_E3.condition: Price was below Middle Band, now closes ABOVE Middle Band
RULE_BB_E3.action: BUY — momentum shifting from bearish to bullish

RULE_BB_X1.name: Upper Band Exit (Overbought)
RULE_BB_X1.condition: Price closes ABOVE Upper Band for 2+ consecutive days
RULE_BB_X1.action: EXIT 50% — price stretched beyond statistical norm; profit book

RULE_BB_X2.name: Middle Band Breakdown Exit
RULE_BB_X2.condition: Price breaks BELOW Middle Band after being above it
RULE_BB_X2.action: EXIT 50% — upward momentum paused; tighten stop

RULE_BB_X3.name: Lower Band Touch Exit (Long positions only)
RULE_BB_X3.condition: Price touches Lower Band from above (not a bounce — a break)

OBV.description: On-Balance Volume — confirms price trend with volume
OBV.formula: OBV(t) = OBV(t-1) + Volume if Close > PrevClose, else OBV(t-1) - Volume

RULE_OBV_E1.name: OBV Accumulation Entry
RULE_OBV_E1.condition: OBV making new highs while price is still in consolidation
RULE_OBV_E1.action: BUY early — smart money accumulating before price breakout

RULE_OBV_E2.name: OBV Bullish Divergence Entry
RULE_OBV_E2.condition: Price makes lower low but OBV makes higher low (buying on dips)
RULE_OBV_E2.action: BUY — institutional buying is absorbing the selling

RULE_OBV_E3.name: OBV Trend Confirmation Entry
RULE_OBV_E3.condition: OBV 20-day moving average is rising AND price breaks resistance
RULE_OBV_E3.action: BUY with higher conviction — volume confirms the breakout

RULE_OBV_X1.name: OBV Divergence Exit
RULE_OBV_X1.condition: Price makes higher high but OBV makes lower high (volume drying up)
RULE_OBV_X1.action: EXIT 50–100% — institutional selling into price rise; top forming

RULE_OBV_X2.name: OBV Trend Break Exit
RULE_OBV_X2.condition: OBV 20-day moving average turns DOWN after being UP
RULE_OBV_X2.action: EXIT 50% and tighten stop — accumulation phase ending

OBV.name: On-Balance Volume

VOLUME_RATIO.description: Volume relative to 20-day average — identifies institutional activity

RULE_VOL_E1.name: Volume Spike Breakout Entry
RULE_VOL_E1.condition: Volume_Ratio > 1.5 AND price breaks above resistance on same candle
RULE_VOL_E1.action: BUY — valid breakout confirmed by institutional participation

RULE_VOL_E2.name: Accumulation Pattern Entry
RULE_VOL_E2.condition: 3+ consecutive up days with increasing volume (each day volume > prior day)
RULE_VOL_E2.action: BUY — systematic institutional accumulation in progress

RULE_VOL_E3.name: Volume Dip Entry
RULE_VOL_E3.condition: Pullback days show Volume_Ratio < 0.8 (low volume = no selling pressure)
RULE_VOL_E3.action: BUY the dip — healthy pullback with no distribution

RULE_VOL_X1.name: Climax Volume Exit
RULE_VOL_X1.condition: Volume_Ratio > 4.0 AND price is at or near highs (exhaustion)
RULE_VOL_X1.action: EXIT 50–100% — climax selling; top likely forming

RULE_VOL_X2.name: Distribution Exit
RULE_VOL_X2.condition: Price rising but Volume declining for 3+ days (price up, volume down)
RULE_VOL_X2.action: EXIT 50% — weak rally; institutions distributing positions

VOLUME_RATIO.name: Volume Ratio

RULE_STOCH_E1.name: Stochastic Oversold Cross Entry
RULE_STOCH_E1.condition: %K crosses ABOVE %D while both are below 20
RULE_STOCH_E1.action: BUY — oversold reversal signal; strong reversal entry

RULE_STOCH_E2.name: Stochastic Bullish Divergence Entry
RULE_STOCH_E2.condition: Price makes lower low but %K makes higher low while below 30
RULE_STOCH_E2.action: BUY — selling exhausted despite price decline

RULE_STOCH_X1.name: Stochastic Overbought Cross Exit
RULE_STOCH_X1.condition: %K crosses BELOW %D while both are above 80

RULE_STOCH_X2.name: Stochastic Bearish Divergence Exit
RULE_STOCH_X2.condition: Price makes higher high but %K makes lower high above 80

FIBONACCI.description: Fibonacci Retracement — identifies support zones for pullback entries

calculation.swing_high: Highest high over lookback period (default 50 days)
calculation.swing_low: Lowest low over lookback period (default 50 days)

RULE_FIB_E1.name: 38.2% Fibonacci Bounce Entry
RULE_FIB_E1.condition: Price pulls back to 38.2% level in strong uptrend AND bounces with bullish candle
RULE_FIB_E1.action: BUY — shallow pullback in strong trend; momentum likely to resume

RULE_FIB_E2.name: 50% Fibonacci Bounce Entry
RULE_FIB_E2.condition: Price pulls back to 50% level with RSI in 40–55 range
RULE_FIB_E2.action: BUY — standard pullback; good R:R from this level

RULE_FIB_E3.name: 61.8% Golden Ratio Entry
RULE_FIB_E3.condition: Price at 61.8% level with bullish divergence or reversal candle
RULE_FIB_E3.action: BUY with tight stop below 61.8% — last support before new low

RULE_FIB_X1.name: Fibonacci Level Failure Exit
RULE_FIB_X1.condition: Price breaks BELOW 61.8% Fibonacci level on closing basis
RULE_FIB_X1.action: EXIT 100% — support structure broken; deeper decline likely

RULE_FIB_X2.name: Fibonacci Extension Target Exit
RULE_FIB_X2.condition: Price reaches 127.2% or 161.8% Fibonacci extension (above prior high)
RULE_FIB_X2.action: EXIT 50% at 127.2% and 50% at 161.8% — measured extension targets

FIBONACCI.name: Fibonacci Retracement

golden_cross.historical_accuracy: 73% win rate in Indian markets (NSE historical data)

RULE_GC_E1.name: Fresh Golden Cross Entry
RULE_GC_E1.condition: Golden Cross fired within last 5 trading days
RULE_GC_E1.action: BUY on next EMA20 pullback — early institutional trend entry
RULE_GC_E1.note: Strongest single entry signal in this system

RULE_GC_E2.name: Golden Cross Continuation Entry
RULE_GC_E2.condition: Golden Cross is active (>5 days) AND price pulls back to EMA50
RULE_GC_E2.action: BUY at EMA50 bounce — trend still intact, better entry

RULE_GC_X1.name: Death Cross Emergency Exit
RULE_GC_X1.condition: Death Cross confirmed (EMA50 crosses below EMA200)
RULE_GC_X1.action: EXIT ALL positions in this stock IMMEDIATELY

ADX.description: Average Directional Index — trend STRENGTH (0-100 scale)

entry_rules.E1: ADX crosses above 25 while DI+ > DI- → Strong bullish trend → BUY
entry_rules.E2: ADX > 25 AND rising for 3+ days → Trend accelerating → BUY/ADD
entry_rules.E3: ADX recovers above 20 after dip below 20 → New trend starting → BUY

exit_rules.X1: ADX > 50 and turning down → Trend exhausting → EXIT 50%
exit_rules.X2: DI- crosses above DI+ while ADX > 25 → Trend reversed → EXIT 100%
exit_rules.X3: ADX falls below 20 → Trend lost → EXIT

ADX.name: Average Directional Index

SUPERTREND.formula: Flips between (HL/2 ± Multiplier*ATR) — bullish when close above supertrend line

entry_rules.E1: Supertrend flips from SELL to BUY → STRONG BUY — highest conviction flip
entry_rules.E2: Price pulls back to Supertrend support line without flipping → BUY dip
entry_rules.E3: Supertrend BUY + ADX > 25 → Best combination — very high conviction

exit_rules.X1: Supertrend flips from BUY to SELL → EXIT 100% IMMEDIATELY — no delay
exit_rules.X2: Price touches Supertrend line 3rd time without bouncing → EXIT 50%

SUPERTREND.name: SuperTrend Indicator

VWAP.description: Volume Weighted Average Price — intraday institutional reference

entry_rules.E1: Price bounces from VWAP on above-avg volume → BUY (intraday/swing)
entry_rules.E2: Price crosses ABOVE VWAP in morning session → BUY institutional momentum
entry_rules.E3: Price retests VWAP twice as support without breaking → BUY double support

exit_rules.X1: Price breaks below VWAP in last hour of session → EXIT intraday
exit_rules.X2: Price >2% above VWAP at session end → Consider partial exit (stretched)

VWAP.name: Volume Weighted Average Price

PARABOLIC_SAR.description: Parabolic SAR — trailing stop and trend direction indicator
PARABOLIC_SAR.formula: SAR = SAR_prev + AF*(EP - SAR_prev); AF from 0.02 to 0.20

entry_rules.E1: SAR flips BELOW price (from above to below) → BUY — uptrend confirmed
entry_rules.E2: SAR below price AND dots far from price → Strong uptrend → ADD position

exit_rules.X1: SAR flips ABOVE price → EXIT 100% — trend reversed
exit_rules.X2: SAR dots rapidly approaching price (acceleration) → EXIT 50% — trend ending

PARABOLIC_SAR.trailing_stop_use: Set trailing SL = current SAR value (auto-updates each day)
PARABOLIC_SAR.name: Parabolic SAR

RELATIVE_STRENGTH_VS_NIFTY.description: Stock performance vs Nifty 50 over 20 days (NOT the RSI indicator)

entry_rules.E1: RS_Ratio > 1.2 → Stock outperforming Nifty → BUY (Mark Minervini SEPA rule)
entry_rules.E2: RS_Ratio rising over last 10 days → Momentum building → BUY

exit_rules.X1: RS_Ratio falls below 0.85 for 5+ days → Underperforming → EXIT
exit_rules.X2: RS_Ratio trending down for 10 days → Sector rotation away → EXIT 50%

RELATIVE_STRENGTH_VS_NIFTY.name: Relative Strength vs Nifty

identification.step1: Find two price lows within 2% of each other
identification.step2: Valley between them (neckline) must be at least 5% above lows
identification.step3: Second low ideally on lower volume than first
identification.step4: CONFIRM: Price closes ABOVE neckline with Volume > 1.5x avg

DOUBLE_BOTTOM.code_logic: Find 2 local minima within 2% of each other with intervening maximum (neckline) 5%+ higher

identification.flagpole: Sharp rally of 10-40% in 5-15 days with high volume
identification.flag: Sideways to slightly downward channel; volume DECLINING; angle max 45 degrees down

BULL_FLAG.entry: Close above upper flag boundary with volume > 1.5x

identification.cup: Rounded bottom; depth 12-35%; left and right rims within 5%; duration 7-65 weeks
identification.handle: Pullback 5-15%; forms in upper half of cup; volume declining; duration 1-4 weeks
identification.breakout: Price + volume spike above pivot (top of handle)

CUP_AND_HANDLE.entry: Close above pivot point on above-average volume

ASCENDING_TRIANGLE.entry: Close above flat resistance with volume > 1.5x

identification.structure: Three troughs: Left Shoulder, Head (lowest), Right Shoulder
identification.neckline: Line connecting two peaks between shoulders
identification.volume: Declining on right shoulder; spike on neckline break

HAMMER.entry: Next candle closes above hammer high
HAMMER.target: Prior resistance or 3x hammer range above entry

identification.peaks: Two highs within 2% of each other

entry_rules.bearish_note: When detected → exit any existing long positions; do not initiate new buys

exit_rules.X1: Detection alone → EXIT all long positions in this stock

identification.structure: Lower highs + higher lows; both trendlines converge

entry_rules.E1_bullish: BREAKOUT up above upper trendline with volume > 1.5x → BUY
entry_rules.E2_bearish: Breakdown below lower trendline → AVOID / EXIT

SYMMETRICAL_TRIANGLE.target: Breakout level ± Triangle width at widest point

identification.day2: Small body / doji gapping down from Day 1
identification.day3: Large bullish candle closing > 50% into Day 1 body
Large bearish candle closing > 50% into Day 1 body

EVENING_STAR.signal: EXIT LONGS — bearish reversal at top

exit_rules.X1: Evening Star detected → EXIT 100% of any existing long position

identification.day2: Bearish candle that opens ABOVE Day 1 close and closes BELOW Day 1 open

exit_rules.X1: Bearish engulfing at resistance → EXIT 50-100%

CUP_AND_HANDLE_WEEKLY.note: Same as daily Cup & Handle but on weekly chart — much stronger signal
CUP_AND_HANDLE_WEEKLY.entry: Weekly close above pivot point (handle high)

stock_entry_exit_rules.description: Entry and exit rules specific to stock category, sector, and type

LARGE_CAP.definition: Market Cap > ₹20,000 Cr | Examples: RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, SBIN, INFY

entry_rules.E1_TREND: Buy in Stage 2 uptrend: Close > EMA50 > EMA200 + RSI 45-70
entry_rules.E2_PULLBACK: Buy EMA20 bounce in uptrend — next candle close above EMA20 + RSI > 45
entry_rules.E3_BREAKOUT: Buy 52W high breakout with Volume > 2x avg + RSI 55-72 (don't chase gap-ups)
entry_rules.E4_FII_FLOW: Buy when FII net > ₹2,000 Cr/day for 3+ consecutive days
entry_rules.E5_POST_EARNINGS: Buy 5-7 days after positive earnings if stock pulled back 5-8%

exit_rules.X1: EMA50 closes below → EXIT 100%
exit_rules.X2: FII sells >₹3,000 Cr for 2+ days → EXIT 50%
exit_rules.X3: Sector becomes weakest for 5+ days → EXIT
exit_rules.X5: Volume dries up (< 0.5x avg) for 3+ days at highs → EXIT 25%
exit_rules.X6: > 15 trading days without T2 → EXIT ALL

MIDCAP.definition: Market Cap ₹5,000–₹20,000 Cr | Examples: USHAMART, CERA, TRENT, POLYCAB, DIXON

entry_rules.E1: Require Golden Cross (mandatory for midcap) + RSI 45-65 + Volume > 1.3x
entry_rules.E2: Breakout must have Volume > 1.5x (higher bar than large cap)
entry_rules.E3: Stock's sector must be in Top 3 momentum sectors
entry_rules.E5: Within 5% of 52W high + Volume > 1.5x + RSI 58-70 → 52W breakout play

exit_rules.X1: Trail to EMA50 (not EMA20 — needs more room)
exit_rules.X2: Sector drops >3% in a session → EXIT 100%
exit_rules.X3: Volume < 0.6x avg for 3+ days at resistance → EXIT 50%
exit_rules.X4: Nifty closes below EMA50 → EXIT (midcaps fall harder in corrections)
exit_rules.X5: 12 trading days without T2 → EXIT ALL
exit_rules.X6: ANY adverse news → EXIT immediately (midcaps react sharply)

SMALLCAP.definition: Market Cap < ₹5,000 Cr | Examples: NDR Auto, SJS Enterprises, Faze Three
SMALLCAP.position_size: Maximum 5% per trade; max 2 smallcap positions simultaneously

entry_rules.E1: Breakout ONLY — Volume > 3x avg + 52W high break or pattern break
entry_rules.E2: Revenue growth > 15% YoY + Net profit positive + D/E < 1.5 (fundamental check mandatory)
entry_rules.E3: NEVER buy smallcap in a downtrend — only when breaking to new highs

exit_rules.X1: EXIT ENTIRE position at T1 (do not hold for T2 in smallcap)
exit_rules.X2: Stop loss max 7% — honor strictly
exit_rules.X3: Volume collapses to < 0.3x avg for 2 days at highs → EXIT immediately
exit_rules.X4: Stock hits lower circuit (10%/20% down) → EXIT — sign of serious trouble

stop_loss.circuit_rule: If stock falls 9% intraday → EXIT before circuit hits

BANKING_NBFC.stocks: HDFCBANK, ICICIBANK, SBIN, AXISBANK, KOTAKBANK, BAJFINANCE, INDUSINDBK

entry_rules.E1: Buy 5-7 days before RBI MPC meeting when rate cut is expected
entry_rules.E2: Buy when FII net buyers for 3+ consecutive days (BFSI primary sector)
entry_rules.E3: Buy after quarterly results showing NPA ratio declined QoQ
entry_rules.E4: Buy individual bank when Bank Nifty breaks above EMA200 on volume
entry_rules.E5: Aggressive buy at start of rate cut cycle — banks benefit most of any sector

exit_rules.X1: EXIT 100% immediately after RBI rate HIKE announcement
exit_rules.X2: EXIT 50% if quarterly NPA ratio increased > 0.5%
exit_rules.X3: EXIT ALL banking on global banking sector stress news
exit_rules.X4: EXIT NBFCs on RBI circular tightening unsecured credit norms
exit_rules.X5: EXIT individual bank if Bank Nifty closes below EMA200

BANKING_NBFC.notes: Bank Nifty F&O expiry on Thursday — avoid new entries on expiry Thursday

IT_TECHNOLOGY.stocks: TCS, INFOSYS, HCLTECH, WIPRO, PERSISTENT, COFORGE | US: AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL

entry_rules.E1: Buy when USD/INR rises above 83 (every ₹1 INR fall = ~2-3% EPS boost for IT)
entry_rules.E2: Buy 3-5 days post results if stock fell on guidance but fundamentals intact
entry_rules.E3: Buy when Nasdaq breaks to new highs (0.7 correlation with Indian IT)
entry_rules.E4: Buy on large deal win (>$100M TCV) with volume > 2x avg
entry_rules.E5: Buy IT in first week of each quarter (pre-results expectation trade)

exit_rules.X1: EXIT 50% if USD/INR falls below 83 (INR strengthening = margin pressure)
exit_rules.X2: EXIT ALL if US GDP prints negative two consecutive quarters
exit_rules.X3: EXIT 100% on quarterly results if revenue guidance cut > 2%
exit_rules.X4: EXIT Indian IT if Nasdaq closes below 200-day SMA

PHARMA_HEALTHCARE.stocks: SUNPHARMA, DRREDDY, CIPLA, DIVISLAB, AUROPHARMA, ALKEM, LUPIN, MAXHEALTH

entry_rules.E1: Buy strongly on USFDA facility clearance after previous warning letter
entry_rules.E2: Buy on new ANDA approval from USFDA
entry_rules.E3: Buy pharma as defensive play when market VIX rises > 20
entry_rules.E4: Buy 5-7 days before quarterly results if stock below EMA50 + fundamentals strong
entry_rules.E5: Buy on successful specialty product launch with guidance upgrade

exit_rules.X1: EXIT ALL on USFDA warning letter — can crash 15-30% same day
exit_rules.X2: EXIT 50% if US price erosion > 8% YoY in quarterly results
exit_rules.X3: EXIT 30% if key competitor gets same molecule ANDA approval
exit_rules.X4: EXIT if key patent expires within 6 months
exit_rules.X5: EXIT 100% immediately on USFDA import alert

PHARMA_HEALTHCARE.monitoring: Check FDA website (fdazilla.com) daily for any action on your pharma stocks

AUTOMOBILE.stocks: MARUTI, TATAMOTORS, M&M, BAJAJ-AUTO, HEROMOTOCO, APOLLOTYRE

entry_rules.E1: Buy 1-2 days after monthly sales data beats estimate by > 5%
entry_rules.E2: Buy in August-September (pre-festive season buildup)
entry_rules.E3: Buy EV-focused autos on positive EV policy announcement
entry_rules.E4: Buy auto stocks when Brent crude falls below $75
entry_rules.E5: Buy 2-wheelers after above-normal monsoon forecast (rural demand)

exit_rules.X1: EXIT 50% if monthly sales misses estimate by > 5%
exit_rules.X2: EXIT if Brent crude > $90
exit_rules.X3: EXIT auto ancillaries if steel prices rise > 15% QoQ
exit_rules.X4: EXIT festive season buys by end of November
exit_rules.X5: EXIT on major new EV competitor entry

METALS_MINING.stocks: TATASTEEL, JSWSTEEL, HINDALCO, COALINDIA, NMDC, VEDL, USHAMART

entry_rules.E1: Buy on China infrastructure stimulus announcement
entry_rules.E2: Buy when LME copper breaks multi-year high (global demand signal)
entry_rules.E3: Buy steel stocks when India budget allocates high infra capex
entry_rules.E4: Buy after 15-20% correction if China PMI turns positive (>50)
entry_rules.E5: Buy when DXY falls below 100 (USD weakness boosts commodity prices)

exit_rules.X1: EXIT immediately on negative China PMI or property sector stress news
exit_rules.X2: EXIT 50% if DXY rises above 106
exit_rules.X3: EXIT if government cuts import duty on steel (margin compression)
exit_rules.X4: EXIT ALL cyclicals on yield curve inversion signal
exit_rules.X5: EXIT if global steel capacity utilization < 75%

FMCG_CONSUMER.stocks: HINDUNILVR, ITC, NESTLEIND, BRITANNIA, DABUR, MARICO, COLPAL

entry_rules.E1: Buy FMCG when VIX > 20 (defensive sector — safe haven in fear)
entry_rules.E2: Buy when palm oil / crude falls (input cost relief — margin expansion)
entry_rules.E3: Buy rural FMCG after good monsoon forecast
entry_rules.E4: Buy after 20-25% sector correction if PE below 5-year avg

exit_rules.X1: EXIT if palm oil/crude surge > 20% in a quarter
exit_rules.X2: EXIT if quarterly volume growth < 3% (demand weakness)
exit_rules.X3: EXIT FMCG at PE > 70x (expensive relative to growth)
exit_rules.X4: EXIT when VIX falls below 13 (money rotates to cyclicals)

ENERGY_OIL_GAS.stocks: RELIANCE, ONGC, OIL_INDIA, BPCL, HPCL, IOC, GAIL, PETRONET

entry_rules.E1: Buy RELIANCE on Jio ARPU growth + retail EBITDA growing
entry_rules.E2: Buy BPCL/HPCL when crude falls AND government raises retail fuel prices
entry_rules.E3: Buy ONGC before record date for high dividend (6-8% yield typically)
entry_rules.E4: Buy ONGC/OIL when crude rises > $75 (higher realization)
entry_rules.E5: Buy GAIL on rising India LNG imports + industrial demand

exit_rules.X1: EXIT ONGC/OIL if crude falls below $65
exit_rules.X2: EXIT BPCL/HPCL if crude > $90 with no retail price hike
exit_rules.X3: EXIT OMCs if election cycle begins (fuel price freeze risk)
exit_rules.X4: EXIT BPCL if divestment cancelled again

INFRASTRUCTURE_CAPGOODS.stocks: L&T, SIEMENS, ABB, BEL, HAL, MTAR, BHARATFORG, CUMMINS, KALPATPOWER

entry_rules.E1: Strong BUY after Union Budget with infra allocation > ₹10 lakh Cr
entry_rules.E2: Buy on major defence export approval or DRDO order
entry_rules.E3: Buy on large order win (> 3x quarterly revenue)
entry_rules.E4: Buy on PLI scheme approval for sector

exit_rules.X1: EXIT if quarterly order inflow misses estimate by >15%
exit_rules.X2: EXIT if infrastructure allocation cut in budget vs previous year
exit_rules.X3: EXIT if EBITDA margin falls below 10%
exit_rules.X4: EXIT on repeated order execution delays

US_STOCKS.stocks: AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, TSLA, AMZN, JPM, BAC

entry_rules.E1: Buy 2-3 days after earnings beat + guidance raised
entry_rules.E2: Buy tech on Fed rate cut signal (growth stocks re-rate higher)
entry_rules.E3: Buy NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL on AI product launch or revenue upgrade
entry_rules.E4: Buy S&P 500 leaders after 10-15% correction if earnings intact
entry_rules.E5: Buy defensive US stocks (JNJ, PG) when VIX > 25

exit_rules.X1: EXIT immediately on guidance cut > 5% from consensus
exit_rules.X2: EXIT high-PE tech if Fed signals rate hike
exit_rules.X3: EXIT GOOGL/META on major antitrust regulatory action
exit_rules.X4: EXIT cyclical US stocks on 2 consecutive GDP contraction quarters
exit_rules.X5: EXIT on gross margin decline > 3% QoQ for 2 consecutive quarters

PSU_STOCKS.examples: SBIN, ONGC, COALINDIA, BEL, HAL, NMDC, NTPC, POWERGRID, BPCL

entry_rules.E1: Buy before divestment announcement (re-rating catalyst)
entry_rules.E2: Buy sector-specific PSU before budget with high allocation expected
entry_rules.E3: Buy 3-4 weeks before record date (5%+ dividend yield)
entry_rules.E4: Buy at P/B < 1.0 if ROE > 12% (historically mean-reverts up)

exit_rules.X1: EXIT 3 months before general election (policy uncertainty)
exit_rules.X2: EXIT if divestment cancelled
exit_rules.X3: EXIT OMC PSUs on fuel price caps
exit_rules.X4: EXIT ONGC/OIL on windfall tax imposition

entry_rules.E1: Buy when USD/INR rises (more INR per dollar = higher revenue)
entry_rules.E2: Buy when US/EU GDP accelerates
entry_rules.E3: Buy on favorable currency hedge position in results

exit_rules.X1: EXIT when USD/INR falls sharply below 82
exit_rules.X2: EXIT on US/EU trade barriers or tariffs on sector
exit_rules.X3: EXIT on US/EU GDP turning negative

entry_rules.E1: Buy at commodity cycle bottom (PE below 5-year avg + commodity recovering)
entry_rules.E2: Buy when China PMI > 50 AND commodity prices rising

exit_rules.X1: EXIT when PE exceeds 5-year avg by 30% + commodity price flattening
exit_rules.X2: EXIT all cyclicals on US yield curve inversion (recession leading indicator)

rules: NEVER enter above entry_high — skip or wait
If price gaps above entry_high at open → SKIP this trade
Prefer limit orders within zone over market orders

methods: Pattern measured move (specific formula per pattern)
target1.selection: Use LOWEST of all methods (most conservative)
target1.action_at_t1: SELL 50% of position; move SL to breakeven

target2.action_at_t2: SELL remaining 50% OR apply trailing stop

methods: Below most recent swing low - (0.2 * ATR14)
stop_loss.selection: Use TIGHTEST (highest) stop that still makes technical sense
rules: NEVER move SL further down once set
Only acceptable modification: move SL UP (trailing)
AUTO-EXIT if stock falls 7% from entry regardless of SL level

rr_ratio.gate: IF rr_ratio < 2.0 → REJECT TRADE (display warning to user)

phase2.stocks: Tier 2 stocks or Tier 1 with RSI pullback
phase2.order_time: When RSI pulls back to < 68 on target stock

phase3.stocks: Tier 3 conditional stocks where trigger has now fired
phase3.note: Also serves as reserve capital if Phase 1/2 stop losses hit

17-20.action: Reduce each phase by 20%; tighter SLs

30+.action: EXIT ALL; hold cash; wait for VIX collapse

stop_loss_exit.emergency_override: If stock falls -7% from entry in any session → AUTO-SELL signal

target1_exit.rule: Price reaches T1 → SELL 50%; move SL to breakeven

trailing_stop.description: Applied to remaining 50% after T1 is hit

target2_exit.exception: If volume > 2x avg AND RSI < 80 → hold 25% with tight trailing stop

time_exit.rule: If no movement toward T1 within 5 trading days → EXIT

entry_rules.E1: CCI crosses above -100 → BUY (oversold reversal)
entry_rules.E2: CCI bullish divergence → BUY

exit_rules.X1: CCI crosses below +100 → EXIT 50%
exit_rules.X2: CCI bearish divergence → EXIT

entry_rules.E1: WR crosses above -80 → BUY (oversold)

exit_rules.X1: WR crosses below -20 → EXIT (overbought)

entry_rules.E1: ROC crosses above 0 → BUY

exit_rules.X1: ROC crosses below 0 → EXIT

entry_rules.E1: Price above cloud + Tenkan > Kijun → BUY
entry_rules.E2: Price breaks above cloud → BUY

exit_rules.X1: Price enters cloud → EXIT 50%
exit_rules.X2: Tenkan crosses below Kijun → EXIT

backtesting_module.ui: Equity curve + drawdown chart + monthly heatmap + trade log table

screener_module.custom_screener_builder: Drag-and-drop condition builder; save and schedule custom screeners

features: Expiry calendar (avoid new entries on expiry Thursday)
OI buildup analyzer (rising price + rising OI = bullish)

expiry_rules.rule1: Avoid new swing entries on F&O expiry Thursday
expiry_rules.rule2: Post-expiry Monday good entry day (clean trend continuation)
expiry_rules.rule3: Track Max Pain ± 3% for directional bias near expiry

earnings_calendar.pre_earnings: Buy 5-7 days before if RSI < 60 + stock below 52W high; SELL 1-2 days before (not holding through results)

fed_rate_cut.action: BUY aggressively — trigger Phase 1 immediately across all sectors

vix_above_25.action: HALT all new positions; manage existing strictly

app_rules.lower_circuit_alert: CRITICAL alert — consider proactive exit before circuit hits
app_rules.near_circuit_rule: If stock down 9% intraday → EXIT immediately before circuit locks you in

auto_orders.safety: User must confirm each order; max 10% per trade; disabled when VIX > 20

eod_data.cache_policy: Store in local SQLite; refresh once daily after 4 PM IST

fii_dii_data.source: NSEIndia website scraping (pandas read_html or requests)
fii_dii_data.refresh: Once per day after market close (4:30 PM IST)

live_data.source: yfinance (delayed 15 min free) or Polygon.io (real-time paid)

global_macro.gift_nifty: yf.download('NIFTY_FUT.NS') — proxy; actual from SGX feed

processing.sentiment_analysis: TextBlob or VADER (free NLP libraries) for headline sentiment
processing.ticker_extraction: spaCy NER + custom stock ticker dictionary (NSE 2000+ stocks + S&P 500)

off_market_mode.description: The app works 24/7 — not just during market hours
features: Pre-market prediction using previous close + global overnight movements
News sentiment analysis on latest headlines
Gift Nifty based gap-up/gap-down prediction for India open
US market overnight move impact on Indian sectors (IT, Pharma especially)
Watchlist monitoring with last known prices
Scan runs on latest EOD data + latest news for next-day preparation
Morning Report auto-generated at 7:30 AM IST

content: Top 5 stocks to watch today (from previous scan)
Recommended Phase 1 buy list with prices

prediction_engine.description: AI-powered price direction and swing trade prediction

methods.name: Technical Score Prediction
methods.logic: Score >= 8.0 + Pattern confirmed + Volume surge = BULLISH prediction
methods.confidence: Based on historical accuracy of each signal combination

methods.name: Multi-Indicator Consensus
methods.logic: Count of bullish signals vs bearish signals across all 9 indicators
methods.output: Bullish if 7+ of 9 indicators bullish; Bearish if 6+ bearish

methods.name: Pattern Target Prediction
methods.logic: Detected pattern → apply measured move formula → price target

methods.name: News Sentiment + Price Impact
methods.logic: Bullish news headline for ticker → +0.5 confidence; multiple bullish → +1.0
methods.output: Sentiment score feeds into overall prediction

methods.name: AI LLM Analysis (Optional)
methods.logic: Send indicator values + news + pattern to GPT-4 API or local Ollama LLM
methods.prompt_template: Section M1 from technical parameters document
methods.output: AI narrative + trade thesis + risk factors

checks.name: Gift Nifty vs Nifty prev close
checks.signal: Positive gap > 50 = caution on buys; Negative gap = buy dip opportunity

checks.name: Asian markets today
checks.signal: All positive = strong open; Shanghai weak = metals weak

checks.name: Crude Oil direction
checks.signal: Down = good for India; Up > 3% = negative

checks.name: India VIX trend
checks.signal: Declining = deploy capital; Rising = reduce risk

checks.name: FII yesterday
checks.signal: Net buyer = bullish; Net seller > 2000 Cr = caution

gmail_setup.auth: App Password (enable 2FA on Gmail → generate App Password)

email_template.subject: 🚨 SwingEdge Alert: [TICKER] [ALERT_TYPE]
body_sections: Current Technical Status (RSI, MACD, EMA, Volume)
Trade Parameters (Entry zone, T1, T2, SL, R:R)

triggers.PATTERN_DETECTED: New bullish pattern identified by scanner
triggers.HIGH_SCORE_STOCK: New stock scores above 8.5 in scan
triggers.FII_HEAVY_SELL: FII sells > ₹3,000 Cr in a session
triggers.DAILY_SCAN_REPORT: Morning email with top 5 swing trade picks (7:30 AM IST)

frequency_limit.digest_mode: Bundle non-urgent alerts into hourly digest

method_options.name: Twilio WhatsApp API
method_options.setup: 1. Create Twilio account (free) → 2. Enable WhatsApp sandbox → 3. Add Twilio phone to contacts → 4. Send join code → 5. Use API

method_options.name: pywhatkit (FREE — uses WhatsApp Web)
method_options.limitation: Requires browser open + WhatsApp logged in on laptop

method_options.name: WhatsApp Business API (Meta)
method_options.setup: Requires business verification; more complex setup

message_template.format: Text with emoji for visual quick scanning
message_template.example:
🔔 SwingEdge Alert
📌 Stock: SBIN
⚡ Type: BUY ZONE REACHED
💰 Price: ₹1,090
🎯 T1: ₹1,134 | T2: ₹1,166
🛑 SL: ₹1,060
📊 RSI: 53.5 | Score: 9.0/10
✅ Action: ENTER POSITION (Phase 1)
⏰ Time: 10:45 AM IST

PRICE_BUY_ALERT.trigger: Live price <= alert_buy_price AND live_price >= entry_low

PRICE_TARGET_ALERT.trigger: Live price >= target1 OR live price >= target2

STOP_LOSS_ALERT.message: ⚠️ STOP LOSS HIT: [TICKER] at ₹[PRICE]. EXIT 100% IMMEDIATELY.

PATTERN_ALERT.trigger: Scanner detects pattern with score >= threshold

FII_ALERT.trigger: FII net sell > 3000 Cr OR FII net buy > 2000 Cr

GOLDEN_CROSS_ALERT.trigger: Golden Cross detected on any watched stock
GOLDEN_CROSS_ALERT.message: Golden Cross confirmed: [TICKER] — EMA50 crossed above EMA200

market_holiday_calendar.logic: Skip scans + mark prices NA + disable market-hour alerts on holidays

error_handling.crash_recovery: Auto-save every 5 min; restore from SQLite on next launch

relative_strength_engine.entry_rule: Only buy if RS_Ratio > 1.0 (Mark Minervini SEPA rule — outperforming Nifty)
relative_strength_engine.exit_rule: Exit if RS_Ratio < 0.85 for 5+ consecutive days

gap_analysis.gap_up_1_3pct: BUY if first 15-min candle bullish + holds above gap
gap_analysis.gap_up_above_5pct: WAIT for pullback to gap level then BUY
gap_analysis.gap_down_1_3pct: Hold existing longs if above SL; no new buys
gap_analysis.gap_down_above_5pct: EXIT if gap takes price below SL; wait 1 hour before assessing bounce
